## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Annotate a type with `[Auto...]`
2. Build the project
3. Observe unexpected behaviour

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any compiler errors or diagnostic messages.

## Minimal Reproduction

```csharp
// Paste the smallest code that reproduces the issue
```

## Environment

- **VoloGen version**: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- **.NET SDK version**: [e.g. 10.0.100]
- **IDE**: [e.g. Visual Studio 2026, Rider 2025.1]
- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or generated source output here.
